test.name: Locality guide for Oklahoma, 1889 — Land Run records
test.description: Checks if the skill recognizes the Land Run of 1889 and directs researchers to land allotment records, homestead applications, and territorial court files.

input.user_message: I’m researching ancestors in Oklahoma during the Land Run of 1889. What records or repositories would help trace families?

judge_context: Must mention the Land Run of 1889. Must highlight homestead applications, land allotments, and territorial court records. Must not suggest statewide vital registration for this period.
